title: NYT/Fortune: Iran agreed to MoU — $25B frozen assets, stop fighting all fronts including Lebanon
snippet: Three senior Iranian officials told NYT that Tehran agreed to 'a memorandum of understanding that would stop the fighting and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.' Deal would release $25 billion in Iranian assets frozen overseas. Agreement would 'halt fighting on all fronts, including in Lebanon.' Terms focus on opening the strait — lifting US naval blockade, allowing free commercial traffic without tolls.
tag_reason: New: NYT exclusive with 3 senior Iranian officials confirming MoU, $25B figure, all-fronts halt.
